title: MAP COMMAND
description: Type /map to see your online server map.
body:
After you type /map a message will be sent in chat to your online server map. 
 ![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zuCNp1am/images/2b24886ca8657cae1588062655a50a9ee7456e49.png)

 This plugin allows server owners to give there players easier access to there online map just with this simple command.

Features:

Sends a customizable clickable map link to players when they run /map  

Supports colour (color) formatting 

Permission access map.use  (soon)

 consider joining the discord @ [DC LINK](https://discord.com/invite/XWNGN8cAwM)
